prevalence.source: European primary care respiratory infection syntheses
prevalence.trend: stable; seasonal peaks with viral outbreaks

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; high cough-related healthcare visits
burden.source: WHO Europe acute respiratory infection context

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Acute cough after URI; exclude pneumonia and asthma exacerbation

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with supportive care; antibiotics usually not indicated

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care diagnosis; chest imaging if pneumonia suspected
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care and bronchodilators if wheezing; avoid routine antibiotics
